title: T2SCH21 Federal and Provincial or Territorial Foreign Income Tax Credits and Federal Logging Tax Credit - Canada.ca
content:
## T2SCH21 Federal and Provincial or Territorial Foreign Income Tax Credits and Federal Logging Tax Credit
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
Corporations resident in Canada and authorized foreign banks can use this schedule to claim a federal foreign non-business income tax credit, a federal foreign business income tax credit or a federal logging tax credit.

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. Accessible Fillable PDF (t2sch21-fill-26e.pdf) Previous years: Accessible Fillable PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: 2019 – Fillable PDF (t2sch21-fill-19e.pdf) 2014 – Fillable PDF (t2sch21-fill-14e.pdf) 2010 – Fillable PDF (t2sch21-fill-10e.pdf)

- Accessible Fillable PDF (t2sch21-fill-26e.pdf)

- 2014 – Fillable PDF (t2sch21-fill-14e.pdf)
- 2010 – Fillable PDF (t2sch21-fill-10e.pdf)
- Print and fill out by hand Standard print PDF (t2sch21-26e.pdf) Previous years: Standard print PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: 2019 – Standard print PDF (t2sch21-19e.pdf) 2014 – Standard print PDF (t2sch21-14e.pdf) 2010 – Standard print PDF (t2sch21-10e.pdf) 2009 – Standard print PDF (t2sch21-09e.pdf) 2006 – Standard print PDF (t2sch21-06e.pdf) 2005 – Standard print PDF (t2sch21-05e.pdf) 2001 – Standard print PDF (t2sch21-01e.pdf)

- Ask for an alternate format You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print. Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Ask for an alternate format
